title: Banana!
description:
This Data Pack adds Bananas to Minecraft! Bananas can be obtained from Jungle Temple Chests or by breaking Jungle Leaves (like apples).

This project was created for the Minecraft server The Utopia.
body:
**Note:** This datapack is very old, and needs to be redone. This will hopefully happen sometime this summer.

This Data Pack adds Bananas to Minecraft! Bananas can be obtained from Jungle Temple Chests or by breaking Jungle Leaves (like apples).
Resource Pack is required!

This project was made for the server The Utopia.

![Banana item in-game!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b5d41fd53edbc687d3881234b9768176a781e8.png)
